title: [merge-conflict] worker8: coap_status.c
description: Resolve merge conflict in lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c between main and integration/worker8-20260722. Keep BOTH sets of changes - do not discard work.
close_reason: Merged worker8 coap_status.c changes with current CCP-17 capacity profile support, robust CBOR encoding (size_t counts, overflow guards, flat capacity fields), improved error handling and init guards. Added new board support and input driver as part of integration. Verified with build.
